experiences.title: Contract Software Engineer
experiences.description: Worked as a Contract Software Engineer.

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
experiences.description: Spearheaded the development of Aquinas University CMS, leveraging React and Spring Boot to enhance administrative efficiency and user engagement by 30%. Optimized CI/CD pipelines using Docker and Kubernetes, reducing deployment times by 25%.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.description: Designed and maintained the 'Tuto' CMS, utilizing Node.js and MongoDB to streamline academic workflows, resulting in a 20% improvement in operational efficiency. Enhanced the video streaming platform, implementing scalable cloud infrastructure that improved platform stability and supported a 50% increase in concurrent users.

experiences.title: Software Engineer Intern
experiences.description: Built a real-time web application using WebSocket technology, allowing users to participate in the Sirasa Lakshapathi TV program. Integrated the application with the KiKi service layer for seamless user interaction and real-time updates. Developed backend services in Java (Spring Boot) to support real-time data processing and analytics.

experiences.title: React Developer
experiences.description: Developed and maintained interactive user interfaces using React, ensuring seamless integration with backend services for scalable web applications
